gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/138)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/138)
text: نُبِّئْتُ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) أَنَّهُ كَرِهَ بَيْعَيْنِ اطْرَحْ وَ خُذْ عَلَى غَيْرِ تَقْلِيبٍ وَ شِرَاءَ مَا لَمْ يُرَ .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Abdul Rahman Bin Hammad, from Muhammad Bin Sinan who said,

‘It has emerged from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> that he<sup>asws</sup> disliked selling of the dropped goods taken upon with being turned around (checked for any damage), and buying what has not been seen’.
en.sarwar: 13. Ahmad ibn Muhammad from has narrated from ‘Abd al-Rahman ibn Hammad from Muhammad ibn Sinan who has said the following: “Abu Ja‘far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘I dislike two kinds of transactions: To say, “Drop the merchandise and receive payment”, and buying something without seeing it.’”
